top_signals.title: US military targeted in Iran war phone-tracking campaign
top_signals.summary: Roaming systems and ad tech were used to try to locate American personnel as Tehran attacked forces in the region
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI and the new Mechanical Turk
top_signals.summary: The evolution of the technology offers fresh opportunities for hoodwinkers and charlatans
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US small caps soar as investors look beyond big tech
top_signals.summary: Russell 2000 on course for best year since 2003, helped by AI spending, tax changes and low valuations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AbraSilver drilling at Diablillos suggests resource growth
top_signals.summary: Latest Diablillos drill results point to silver-gold resource growth beyond the DFS mine plan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: India Asks State Banks to Step Up Foreign Currency Deposits
top_signals.summary: India has asked state-owned banks to intensify efforts to garner foreign currency deposits from the 35-million-strong diaspora, as the country seeks to boost its external buffers and shore up the flagging rupee.

top_signals.title: RIP the US state department
top_signals.summary: America’s diplomats used to have global sway. Now they are besieged by their own president

top_signals.title: Why the world should copy Trump for once
top_signals.summary: The US is offering $1,000 to fund investment accounts for children born during the president’s second term

top_signals.title: Commission designates Special Representative for Cyprus
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 13 Jul 2026 The European Commission has designated Executive Vice-President Raffaele Fitto as Commission's Special Representative for Cyprus. In this capacity, he will contribute to the settlement process within the United Nations framework, in close cooperation with the UN Secretary-General's Personal Envoy on Cyprus, María Ángela Holguín Cuéllar.

top_signals.title: Commission greenlights Czechia's sixth payment request for €897 million under NextGenerationEU
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 13 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission positively assessed  Czechia's sixth  payment request for €897 million under the Recovery and Resilience Facility, the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU.

top_signals.title: Metered electricity demand in the New York ISO falls midday because of small-scale solar
top_signals.summary: An increase in electricity generation from small-scale solar in New York has decreased the midday demand for metered electricity, amid overall declining load in the state. The trend is particularly notable in the early spring (March and April), when solar generation has an outsized impact because demand is relatively low and conditions for solar generation are favorable.

top_signals.title: India to invest in foreign uranium mines
top_signals.summary: India’s NTPC seeks overseas uranium mine financing to secure fuel for a massive nuclear power expansion targeting 100 GW capacity by 2047.
